---
title: "Health Resources"
description: "Comprehensive health education resources, guidelines, and tools for preventive care and disease management."
---

# Health Resources

Access our collection of evidence-based health resources designed to empower individuals and communities with knowledge for better health outcomes.

## Preventive Care

### NCD Prevention Guidelines
- [Diabetes Prevention](https://www.who.int/health-topics/diabetes)
- [Hypertension Management](https://www.who.int/health-topics/hypertension)
- [Cardiovascular Health](https://www.who.int/health-topics/cardiovascular-diseases)

### Immunization Schedules
- [Indian Immunization Schedule](https://www.mohfw.gov.in/)
- [COVID-19 Vaccination Updates](https://www.mohfw.gov.in/)

## Disease Management

### Diabetes Resources
- Blood sugar monitoring guides
- Dietary recommendations
- Exercise plans for diabetics
- Medication adherence tips

### Hypertension Management
- Home blood pressure monitoring
- DASH diet guidelines
- Stress management techniques
- Medication information

### Respiratory Health
- Asthma action plans
- COPD management
- Smoking cessation resources

## Maternal and Child Health

### Pregnancy Care
- Antenatal care checklists
- Nutrition during pregnancy
- Warning signs and when to seek help

### Child Health
- Growth monitoring charts
- Common childhood illnesses
- Developmental milestones
- Pediatric vaccination reminders

## Mental Health and Deaddiction

### Mental Health Resources
- Stress management techniques
- Anxiety and depression resources
- Suicide prevention helplines

### Addiction Recovery
- Understanding addiction
- Withdrawal management
- Relapse prevention strategies
- Support group information

## COVID-19 Resources

### Prevention
- Mask usage guidelines
- Hand hygiene protocols
- Social distancing measures

### Management
- Home isolation guidelines
- Symptom tracking
- When to seek medical help

## Health Calculators and Tools

### BMI Calculator
Calculate your Body Mass Index to assess weight status.

### Calorie Counter
Track daily caloric intake for weight management.

### Water Intake Calculator
Determine your daily water requirements.

## Educational Materials

### Infographics
- NCD risk factors
- Healthy eating plate
- Exercise recommendations

### Videos
- Health education webinars
- Exercise demonstrations
- Cooking healthy meals

### Articles
- Latest health research summaries
- Public health news
- Expert opinions

## Downloadable Resources

[Download our comprehensive health toolkit (PDF)](health_toolkit.pdf)

## Partner Resources

- [Ministry of Health and Family Welfare](https://www.mohfw.gov.in/)
- [World Health Organization](https://www.who.int/)
- [Indian Council of Medical Research](https://www.icmr.gov.in/)

## Contribute Resources

Help us expand our resource library! If you have health education materials you'd like to share, please contact us at resources@epipulse.org.

*All resources are reviewed for accuracy and relevance. For medical advice, please consult healthcare professionals.*
